subcodes.title: Words spoken at King's Weigh House Church in London, 1912-12-29
subcodes.first_line: I praise God that a number of revered souls are gathered in this congregation to serve the Almighty, whose hearts are cemented together, whose faces are joyous
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدا را شکر میکنم که در این محل جمعی از محترمین حاضرند که قلوبشان با یکدیگر
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @unity; oneness of humanity, @unity in diversity, @universal peace; world unity, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @suffering and imprisonment, @oneness; unity of religion, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
